manifest.author: Sparsh Yadav
manifest.name: Quickly
manifest.description: Quickly empowers you to add your thoughts into obsidian with a shortcut key.

manifest.author: James Greenhalgh MBCS
manifest.name: Quick note
manifest.description: Create a quick note in a floating window (on command or by right-clicking the Obsidian app icon)

manifest.author: Guy Zana
manifest.name: QuickTimeBox
manifest.description: Embed interactive timeboxing in any note (quickly).

manifest.author: Sean Blakey
manifest.name: Quip
manifest.description: This plugin provides commands to publish Markdown documents to Quip.com

manifest.author: Edward Cui
manifest.name: Quiz Generator
manifest.description: Generate interactive flashcards from your notes using models from OpenAI (ChatGPT), Google (Gemini), Ollama (local LLMs), and more. Or manually create your own to use with the quiz UI.

manifest.author: Florin Bobis
manifest.name: Quote of the Day
manifest.description: Inserts random quotes in the editor

manifest.author: duocnv
manifest.name: Quote Share
manifest.description: With this plugin, you can easily generate beautiful gradient images from text and share them on social media.

manifest.name: Quoth
manifest.description: More flexible embedding. Embed precise selections, inline embeds, optionally include author and title.

manifest.author: Ammar Alakkad
manifest.name: Quran Helper
manifest.description: Find and insert any Quran Ayah (verse) in your notes.

manifest.author: Ramy Samy
manifest.name: Quran inserter
manifest.description: Insert Quran verses into the editor by specifying the surah and ayah number.

manifest.author: Luis Cipriani
manifest.name: Radar
manifest.description: Visualize your notes and ideas on a radar. Group them by topic, prioritize by proximity to the center, and keep focus when juggling multiple areas at once. Do not lose sight of items that might be hiding good opportunities.

manifest.author: Eric Rhys Taylor
manifest.name: Radial timeline
manifest.description: Radial Timeline maps your manuscript across four modes — Progress, Narrative, Chronologue, and Gossamer — plus the Inquiry View for higher-level story analysis. Visualize scenes, subplots, structure, chronology, and story shape in one connected workspace.

manifest.author: a2Fsa2k
manifest.name: RAG Chat
manifest.description: Chat with your vault using local vector search (RAG) and any AI provider — OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Mistral, Groq, Ollama, and more.

manifest.author: Kevin Woblick
manifest.name: Rainbow-Colored Sidebar
manifest.description: Automatically color your sidebar like a rainbow. No configuration needed. 18 themes included.

manifest.author: Dee
manifest.name: Rainbow Folders Fixer
manifest.description: Stop rainbow folders from changing colors when you scroll through the File explorer.

manifest.author: Norman-lawyer
manifest.name: Rainbow Highlight
manifest.description: Beautiful multi-color text highlighting with a quick color palette popup

manifest.author: janTatesa
manifest.name: Random broken link
manifest.description: Expand your knowledge by visiting random broken links.

manifest.author: Tom Parker-Shemilt
manifest.name: Random names
manifest.description: Generates random names

manifest.author: wogong
manifest.name: Random Note Plus
manifest.description: Like the core Random note plugin, but with folder exclusions.

manifest.author: iRewiewer
manifest.name: Random Number Generator
manifest.description: Insert a ranodm number.

manifest.author: Rachninomav
manifest.name: random-retrieval
manifest.description: Random Note Retrieval based on LLMs.

manifest.author: ShockThunder
manifest.name: Random Structural Diary
manifest.description: This is a plugin for picking random questions from prepared question list. It allows you answer on different questions each time.

manifest.author: SpencerF718
manifest.name: Random Wikipedia Article
manifest.description: Generates a note for a random Wikipedia article.

manifest.author: Instant AI
manifest.name: Rapid AI
manifest.description: AI Assistant for selected text and generating content with Markdown. Shortcuts and quick action buttons provide instant AI assistance. It provides a high availability API for unlimited Chat GPT request rates, so you can ensure smooth work for any workload.

manifest.author: Elias Noesis
manifest.name: Reactive Notes
manifest.description: Transform your vault into a reactive computational environment. Create dynamic React components directly in your notes.

manifest.author: mrKazzila - Ilya Kazakov
manifest.name: Read Only View
manifest.description: Forces notes to open in read-only preview mode. Lock your files to prevent accidental edits with this simple editor lock tool.

manifest.author: zuchka
manifest.name: Readability Score
manifest.description: Score the readabilty of your writing using the Flesch Reading Ease (FRE) formula.

manifest.author: Cyrus Zhang
manifest.name: Readavocado Sync
manifest.description: Sync your Readavocado highlights with Obsidian

manifest.author: Makebit
manifest.name: Readeck Importer
manifest.description: Import bookmarks from Readeck.

manifest.author: DuckTapeKiller
manifest.name: Reader Highlighter Tags
manifest.description: Highlight text and add tags in Reading View.

manifest.author: Dominik Mayer
manifest.name: Reader Mode
manifest.description: Ensures notes are always opened in reader mode.

manifest.author: polybjorn
manifest.name: Readest Highlights
manifest.description: Import highlights and annotations from Readest into your vault.

manifest.author: BumbrT
manifest.name: Reading comments
manifest.description: Plugin allows you to create comments while you read books or articles in Obsidian. Comments could be grouped hierarchically by tags.

manifest.author: keithwithAI
manifest.name: Reading Highlighter
manifest.description: Highlight selected text in reading mode using markdown highlight syntax.

manifest.author: qian-shen
manifest.name: Reading progress desktop
manifest.description: A progress bar for some views in the status bar(desktopAPP).

repo.Err: Plugin reading-view-enhancer was removed, skipping repository extraction

manifest.author: jsonmartin, johannrichard
manifest.name: Readwise mirror
manifest.description: Mirror your Readwise library directly to an Obsidian vault

manifest.author: Readwise
manifest.name: Readwise Official
manifest.description: Official Readwise <-> Obsidian integration

manifest.author: Grayson Patterson
manifest.name: Real Tasks
manifest.description: Deletes task lines shortly after their checkbox is marked done so your notes only keep real, open work. Includes a ribbon button for quickly inserting a new task.

manifest.author: Yishen Tu
manifest.name: Claudian
manifest.description: Embeds Claude Code, Codex, and other coding agents as AI collaborators in your vault. Your vault becomes their working directory, giving them capabilities for file reads and writes, search, bash commands, and multi-step workflows.

manifest.author: garetneda-gif
manifest.name: Realtime Transcription
manifest.description: Real-time speech-to-text powered by SenseVoice-Small. Supports Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Cantonese with auto-translation, AI summarization, and text polishing.

manifest.author: Joshua Pham
manifest.name: Enzyme
manifest.description: AI chat for your vault, powered by Enzyme's local semantic index.

manifest.author: Chris Wagner
manifest.name: Recent Edits
manifest.description: Shows files modified in the last N days, grouped by day. Marks edits made from filesystem writes with a configurable indicator.

manifest.author: Tony Grosinger
manifest.name: Recent Files
manifest.description: List files by most recently opened.

manifest.author: Kamil Rudnicki
manifest.name: Recent Notes
manifest.description: List of recently edited notes with previews by time periods

manifest.author: Samuel Ang
manifest.name: Recent Tab Switcher
manifest.description: Switch to the most recently used tab.

manifest.author: Lemon695
manifest.name: Recently Added Files
manifest.description: List files by last added, including pictures, MP4s, PDFs etc.

manifest.author: seethroughdev
manifest.name: Recipe Grabber
manifest.description: Quickly grab the important contents of any online recipe.

manifest.author: lachholden
manifest.name: Recipe view
manifest.description: View your notes as interactive recipe cards while you cook.

manifest.author: ReClipped
manifest.name: ReClipped Official
manifest.description: Official ReClipped and Obsidian integration
